meta.title: Marine Corps Boot Camp Training Advice - Close Order Drill
meta.description:
Sandboxx is an app created by Marines to help Poolees get ready for boot camp. During boot camp and their careers, Marines can used Sandboxx to stay in touch with their families and units. 

Download the Sandboxx app free: https://lynm.app.link/yts

Get more from Sandboxx:
https://www.facebook.com/sandboxxapp/ 
https://twitter.com/sandboxx
https://www.instagram.com/sandboxxapp/
https://www.pinterest.com/sandboxxapp/
http://www.sandboxx.us/
